subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise on this Day befitteth and beseemeth Him Whom the tumult and trembling of all created things cannot diminish from the glory of His praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد الیوم حامدی را لایق و سزاست که هجوم و رجف اهل امکان عرصه ثنایش را
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
